            // panelHeader â€” Dark banner
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•

            SetLabel(lblName, "TÃŠN Dá»° ÃN *", lx, y);
            SetTextBox(txtName, "Nháº­p tÃªn dá»± Ã¡n...", lx, y + 18, tw, 1);

            // â”€â”€ KhÃ¡ch hÃ ng â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

            y += gap;

            y += gap;

            txtDescription.BorderStyle = BorderStyle.FixedSingle;

            txtDescription.Size = new System.Drawing.Size(tw, 60);
            txtDescription.TabIndex = 8;

            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnSave, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Primary);

            // Form
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            this.AutoScaleDimensions = new System.Drawing.SizeF(7F, 15F);

            this.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;

            this.MinimizeBox = false;

            this.Text = "Dá»± Ã¡n";

            this.Controls.Add(panelBody);

            this.Controls.Add(panelHeader);

            panelHeader.ResumeLayout(false);
            panelBody.ResumeLayout(false);

            panelFooter.ResumeLayout(false);
            this.ResumeLayout(false);

        // â”€â”€ Private layout helpers â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>Táº¡o Label field chuáº©n â€” dÃ¹ng UIHelper thay vÃ¬ hard-code.</summary>
        private static void SetLabel(Label lbl, string text, int x, int y)
        {
            lbl.AutoSize = true;
            lbl.Font = new System.Drawing.Font("Segoe UI", 8.5F, System.Drawing.FontStyle.Bold);
            lbl.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorDark;
            lbl.Location = new System.Drawing.Point(x, y);
            lbl.Text = text;
        }

        /// <summary>Táº¡o TextBox field chuáº©n â€” dÃ¹ng UIHelper thay vÃ¬ hard-code.</summary>
        private static void SetTextBox(TextBox txt, string placeholder, int x, int y, int w, int tabIdx)
        {
            txt.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.White;
            txt.BorderStyle = BorderStyle.FixedSingle;
            txt.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;
            txt.Location = new System.Drawing.Point(x, y);
            txt.PlaceholderText = placeholder;
            txt.Size = new System.Drawing.Size(w, 30);
            txt.TabIndex = tabIdx;
        }

        /// <summary>Táº¡o ComboBox field chuáº©n.</summary>
        private static void StyleCombo(ComboBox cbo, int x, int y, int w, int tabIdx)
        {
            cbo.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.White;
            cbo.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList;
            cbo.Font = UIHelper.FontBase;
            cbo.Location = new System.Drawing.Point(x, y);
            cbo.Size = new System.Drawing.Size(w, 30);
            cbo.TabIndex = tabIdx;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Field declarations â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private Panel panelHeader, panelAccentLine, panelBody, panelFooter, panelFooterLine;
        private Label lblTitleForm, lblError;
        private Label lblName, lblCustomer, lblOwner, lblStart, lblDeadline;
        private Label lblBudget, lblPriority, lblDesc;
        private TextBox txtName, txtBudget, txtDescription;
        private ComboBox cboCustomer, cboOwner, cboPriority;
        private DateTimePicker dtpStartDate, dtpDeadline;
        private CheckBox chkDeadline;
        private Button btnSave, btnCancel;
    }
}


### ========================================--- FILE: D:\Học tập\Lập Trình Quản Lý\Do-An_Giai-Doan-10\TaskFlowManagement\TaskFlowManagement.WinForms\Forms\frmProjectMembers.cs ---
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Entities;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces.Services;
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Quáº£n lÃ½ thÃ nh viÃªn dá»± Ã¡n â€“ thÃªm developer, gÃ¡n vai trÃ², xÃ³a (soft delete).
    /// </summary>
    public partial class frmProjectMembers : BaseForm
    {
        private readonly IProjectService _projectService;
        private readonly IUserService _userService;
        private readonly Project _project;
        private List<ProjectMember> _members = new();
        private List<User> _availableUsers = new();

        public frmProjectMembers(
            IProjectService projectService,
            IUserService userService,
            Project project)
        {
            _projectService = projectService;
            _userService = userService;
            _project = project;
            InitializeComponent();

            // Cáº­p nháº­t tiÃªu Ä‘á» header vá»›i tÃªn dá»± Ã¡n thá»±c táº¿
            var title = $"ðŸ‘¥  ThÃ nh viÃªn â€” {_project.Name}";
            this.Text = title;
            lblTitle.Text = title;

            // Developer chá»‰ xem, khÃ´ng thÃªm/xÃ³a
            bool canEdit = AppSession.IsManager;
            panelAdd.Visible = canEdit;
            btnRemove.Visible = canEdit;
        }

        protected override async void OnLoad(EventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnLoad(e);
            await LoadMembersAsync();
            await LoadAvailableUsersAsync();

            // Load danh sÃ¡ch vai trÃ² trong dá»± Ã¡n
            cboProjectRole.Items.AddRange(new object[] { "Developer", "Tester", "BA", "Tech Lead" });
            cboProjectRole.SelectedIndex = 0;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Load Data â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async Task LoadMembersAsync()
        {
            _members = await _projectService.GetMembersAsync(_project.Id);
            dgvMembers.Rows.Clear();
            foreach (var m in _members)
            {
                dgvMembers.Rows.Add(
                    m.UserId,
                    m.User?.FullName ?? "â€”",
                    m.User?.Email ?? "â€”",
                    m.ProjectRole ?? "â€”",
                    m.JoinedAt.ToLocalTime().ToString("dd/MM/yyyy"));
            }
            lblCount.Text = $"{_members.Count} thÃ nh viÃªn";
        }

        private async Task LoadAvailableUsersAsync()
        {
            var allActive = await _userService.GetAllActiveUsersAsync();
            var memberIds = _members.Select(m => m.UserId).ToHashSet();
            _availableUsers = allActive.Where(u => !memberIds.Contains(u.Id)).ToList();

            cboUser.Items.Clear();
            foreach (var u in _availableUsers)
                cboUser.Items.Add($"{u.FullName}  ({u.Username})");
            if (cboUser.Items.Count > 0) cboUser.SelectedIndex = 0;
            
            // GD10: Tá»± Ä‘á»™ng Ä‘iá»u chá»‰nh kÃ­ch thÆ°á»›c Dropdown
            cboUser.AdjustDropDownWidth();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Events â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnAddMember_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (cboUser.SelectedIndex < 0)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(
                    "Vui lÃ²ng chá»n ngÆ°á»i dÃ¹ng.",
                    "ThÃ´ng bÃ¡o", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                return;
            }

            // FIX BUG #3: Chá»‘ng spam-click nÃºt ThÃªm
            btnAddMember.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                var user = _availableUsers[cboUser.SelectedIndex];
                var role = cboProjectRole.SelectedItem?.ToString() ?? "Developer";

                var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.AddMemberAsync(_project.Id, user.Id, role);
                if (ok)
                {
                    await LoadMembersAsync();
                    await LoadAvailableUsersAsync();
                }
                else
                {
                    MessageBox.Show(msg, "Lá»—i", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                btnAddMember.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private async void btnRemove_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (dgvMembers.SelectedRows.Count == 0) return;
            int userId = (int)dgvMembers.SelectedRows[0].Cells["colMemberId"].Value;
            var member = _members.FirstOrDefault(m => m.UserId == userId);
            if (member == null) return;

            if (MessageBox.Show(
                    $"XÃ³a \"{member.User?.FullName}\" khá»i dá»± Ã¡n?\n\nLá»‹ch sá»­ tham gia váº«n Ä‘Æ°á»£c lÆ°u láº¡i.",
                    "XÃ¡c nháº­n", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            // FIX BUG #3: Chá»‘ng spam-click nÃºt XÃ³a thÃ nh viÃªn
            btnRemove.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                var (ok, _) = await _projectService.RemoveMemberAsync(_project.Id, userId);
                if (ok)
                {
                    await LoadMembersAsync();
                    await LoadAvailableUsersAsync();
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                btnRemove.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private void btnClose_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
            => this.Close();
    }
}

### ========================================--- FILE: D:\Học tập\Lập Trình Quản Lý\Do-An_Giai-Doan-10\TaskFlowManagement\TaskFlowManagement.WinForms\Forms\frmProjects.cs ---
// ============================================================
//  frmProjects.cs  (REFACTORED)
//  TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
//
//  THAY Äá»”I SO Vá»šI PHIÃŠN Báº¢N CÅ¨:
//  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
//  [UI]
//   â€¢ Káº¿ thá»«a BaseForm thay vÃ¬ Form trá»±c tiáº¿p
//   â€¢ KHÃ”NG hard-code mÃ u/font á»Ÿ Ä‘Ã¢y ná»¯a â€” dÃ¹ng UIHelper.*
//
//  [Logic Leak â†’ Ä‘Ã£ bÃ³c lÃªn UIHelper]
//   â€¢ BindGrid: status text mapping  â†’ UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus()
//   â€¢ BindGrid: row color logic      â†’ UIHelper.ApplyProjectRowStyle()
//   â€¢ ApplyFilter: váº«n á»Ÿ Ä‘Ã¢y vÃ¬ Ä‘Ã¢y lÃ  UI-concern (lá»c trÃªn dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘Ã£ táº£i)
//
//  [Dead Code Ä‘Ã£ xÃ³a]
//   â€¢ SetToolButton() trong Designer â†’ thay báº±ng UIHelper.StyleToolButton()
// ============================================================
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Entities;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces.Services;
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    /// <summary>
    /// MÃ n hÃ¬nh danh sÃ¡ch dá»± Ã¡n (Quáº£n lÃ½ Dá»± Ã¡n).
    /// <list type="bullet">
    ///   <item>Manager/Admin: Táº¡o, sá»­a, xÃ³a, Ä‘á»•i tráº¡ng thÃ¡i, quáº£n lÃ½ thÃ nh viÃªn.</item>
    ///   <item>Developer: Chá»‰ xem dá»± Ã¡n mÃ¬nh tham gia (read-only).</item>
    /// </list>
    /// </summary>
    public partial class frmProjects : BaseForm   // â† Ä‘á»•i tá»« Form sang BaseForm
    {
        // â”€â”€ Dependencies â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private readonly IProjectService    _projectService;
        private readonly IUserService       _userService;
        private readonly ITaskService       _taskService;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepo;

        // â”€â”€ State â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private List<Project> _allProjects  = new();
        private Project?      _selectedProject;

        // â”€â”€ Constructor â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        public frmProjects(
            IProjectService    projectService,
            IUserService       userService,
            ITaskService       taskService,
            ICustomerRepository customerRepo)
        {
            _projectService = projectService;
            _userService    = userService;
            _taskService    = taskService;
            _customerRepo   = customerRepo;

            InitializeComponent();
            SetupPermissions();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Permissions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>áº¨n toÃ n bá»™ nÃºt write-action náº¿u user lÃ  Developer.</summary>
        private void SetupPermissions()
        {
            bool canEdit = AppSession.IsManager;
            btnAdd.Visible    = canEdit;
            btnEdit.Visible   = canEdit;
            btnDelete.Visible = canEdit;
            btnStatus.Visible = canEdit;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Form Load â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        protected override async void OnLoad(EventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnLoad(e);
            await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Data Loading â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>Load danh sÃ¡ch dá»± Ã¡n tá»« DB theo quyá»n user hiá»‡n táº¡i.</summary>
        private async Task LoadProjectsAsync()
        {
            SetStatus("â³ Äang táº£i...");
            try
            {
                _allProjects = await _projectService.GetProjectsForUserAsync(
                    AppSession.UserId, AppSession.IsManager);

                // Load chi tiáº¿t members cho má»—i project (Ä‘á»ƒ Ä‘áº¿m thÃ nh viÃªn)
                for (int i = 0; i < _allProjects.Count; i++)
                {
                    var detail = await _projectService.GetProjectDetailsAsync(_allProjects[i].Id);
                    if (detail != null) _allProjects[i] = detail;
                }

                ApplyFilter();
                SetStatus($"âœ… Tá»•ng: {_allProjects.Count} dá»± Ã¡n");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                SetStatus("âš  Lá»—i táº£i dá»¯ liá»‡u.");
                MessageBox.Show($"KhÃ´ng thá»ƒ táº£i danh sÃ¡ch dá»± Ã¡n:\n{ex.Message}",
                    "Lá»—i", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ Filter / Bind â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>
        /// Lá»c danh sÃ¡ch theo tá»« khÃ³a tÃ¬m kiáº¿m vÃ  tráº¡ng thÃ¡i.
        /// ÄÃ¢y lÃ  UI-concern há»£p lá»‡: lá»c trÃªn táº­p dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘Ã£ táº£i vá» client.
        /// </summary>
        private void ApplyFilter()
        {
            var keyword      = txtSearch.Text.Trim().ToLowerInvariant();
            var statusFilter = cboFilterStatus.SelectedIndex > 0
                ? cboFilterStatus.SelectedItem!.ToString()!
                : string.Empty;

            var filtered = _allProjects.Where(p =>
            {
                bool matchKeyword = string.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword)
                    || p.Name.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(keyword)
                    || (p.Customer?.CompanyName?.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(keyword) ?? false)
                    || (p.Owner?.FullName?.ToLowerInvariant().Contains(keyword) ?? false);

                bool matchStatus = string.IsNullOrEmpty(statusFilter)
                    || p.Status == statusFilter;

                return matchKeyword && matchStatus;
            }).ToList();

            BindGrid(filtered);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Hiá»ƒn thá»‹ danh sÃ¡ch dá»± Ã¡n lÃªn DataGridView.
        /// Gá»i UIHelper cho text mapping vÃ  row color â€” khÃ´ng hard-code táº¡i Ä‘Ã¢y.
        /// </summary>
        private void BindGrid(List<Project> projects)
        {
            dgvProjects.Rows.Clear();

            foreach (var p in projects)
            {
                // â”€â”€ Chuáº©n bá»‹ giÃ¡ trá»‹ hiá»ƒn thá»‹ â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
                // [REFACTOR] status text â†’ UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus() (khÃ´ng cÃ²n switch inline)
                var statusText   = UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus(p.Status);
                var deadline     = p.PlannedEndDate.HasValue
                    ? p.PlannedEndDate.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "â€”";
                var budget       = p.Budget > 0
                    ? p.Budget.ToString("N0") + " â‚«" : "â€”";
                var memberCount  = p.Members?.Count(m => m.LeftAt == null) ?? 0;

                int idx = dgvProjects.Rows.Add(
                    p.Id,
                    p.Name,
                    p.Customer?.CompanyName ?? "â€”",
                    p.Owner?.FullName ?? "â€”",
                    statusText,
                    $"{memberCount} ngÆ°á»i",
                    deadline,
                    budget,
                    p.StartDate.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy"));

                // [REFACTOR] Row color â†’ UIHelper.ApplyProjectRowStyle() (khÃ´ng cÃ²n if/else inline)
                UIHelper.ApplyProjectRowStyle(dgvProjects.Rows[idx], p.Status, p.PlannedEndDate);
            }

            lblCount.Text = $"{projects.Count} dá»± Ã¡n";
        }

        // â”€â”€ Selection â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void dgvProjects_SelectionChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (dgvProjects.SelectedRows.Count == 0)
            {
                _selectedProject = null;
                UpdateButtons();
                return;
            }

            int id = (int)dgvProjects.SelectedRows[0].Cells["colId"].Value;
            _selectedProject = _allProjects.FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);
            UpdateButtons();
        }

        private void UpdateButtons()
        {
            bool sel = _selectedProject != null;
            btnEdit.Enabled    = sel;
            btnDelete.Enabled  = sel;
            btnMembers.Enabled = sel;
            btnStatus.Enabled  = sel;
            btnDetail.Enabled  = sel;
            btnKanban.Enabled  = sel;
        }

        // â”€â”€ CRUD Actions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnAdd_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            using var dlg = new frmProjectEdit(_projectService, _userService, _customerRepo, null);
            if (dlg.ShowDialog(this) == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        private async void btnEdit_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            var detail = await _projectService.GetProjectDetailsAsync(_selectedProject.Id);
            if (detail == null) return;

            using var dlg = new frmProjectEdit(_projectService, _userService, _customerRepo, detail);
            if (dlg.ShowDialog(this) == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        private async void btnDelete_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            if (MessageBox.Show(
                    $"XÃ³a dá»± Ã¡n \"{_selectedProject.Name}\"?\n\nChá»‰ xÃ³a Ä‘Æ°á»£c náº¿u dá»± Ã¡n chÆ°a cÃ³ cÃ´ng viá»‡c nÃ o.",
                    "XÃ¡c nháº­n xÃ³a",
                    MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Warning) != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            // FIX BUG #3: Chá»‘ng spam-click nÃºt XÃ³a
            btnDelete.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.DeleteProjectAsync(_selectedProject.Id);
                MessageBox.Show(msg,
                    ok ? "ThÃ nh cÃ´ng" : "KhÃ´ng thá»ƒ xÃ³a",
                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                    ok ? MessageBoxIcon.Information : MessageBoxIcon.Error);

                if (ok) await LoadProjectsAsync();
            }
            finally
            {
                btnDelete.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ Status Change â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        // FIX BUG #7: LÆ°u field Ä‘á»ƒ Dispose trÃ¡nh GDI handle leak
        private ContextMenuStrip? _statusMenu;

        private async void btnStatus_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;

            // FIX BUG #3: Chá»‘ng spam-click nÃºt Tráº¡ng thÃ¡i
            btnStatus.Enabled = false;
            try
            {
                _statusMenu?.Dispose();
                _statusMenu = new ContextMenuStrip();
                var menu     = _statusMenu;
                var statuses = new[] { "NotStarted", "InProgress", "OnHold", "Completed", "Cancelled" };

                foreach (var s in statuses)
                {
                    var status = s;
                    var item   = menu.Items.Add(UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus(status));
                    item.Click += async (_, _) =>
                    {
                        var (ok, msg) = await _projectService.ChangeStatusAsync(_selectedProject.Id, status);
                        if (ok) await LoadProjectsAsync();
                        else    MessageBox.Show(msg, "Lá»—i", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                    };
                }
                menu.Show(btnStatus, new Point(0, btnStatus.Height));
            }
            finally
            {
                btnStatus.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        // â”€â”€ Members â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnMembers_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            using var dlg = new frmProjectMembers(_projectService, _userService, _selectedProject);
            dlg.ShowDialog(this);
            await LoadProjectsAsync();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Kanban â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void btnKanban_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("Vui lÃ²ng chá»n má»™t dá»± Ã¡n Ä‘á»ƒ xem Kanban Board.",
                    "ChÆ°a chá»n dá»± Ã¡n", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                return;
            }
            using var dlg = new frmKanban(_taskService, _projectService, _userService, _selectedProject.Id);
            dlg.ShowDialog(this);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Detail â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void btnDetail_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_selectedProject == null) return;
            var detail = await _projectService.GetProjectDetailsAsync(_selectedProject.Id);
            if (detail == null) { MessageBox.Show("KhÃ´ng tÃ¬m tháº¥y dá»± Ã¡n.", "Lá»—i"); return; }

            // NOTE: CÃ¡c phÃ©p tÃ­nh memberCount, taskCount, totalExpense á»Ÿ Ä‘Ã¢y lÃ  UI formatting
            // thuáº§n tÃºy (chá»‰ Ä‘á»ƒ show MessageBox), khÃ´ng pháº£i business logic thá»±c sá»±.
            // Náº¿u cáº§n dÃ¹ng á»Ÿ nhiá»u nÆ¡i â†’ táº¡o ProjectSummaryDto á»Ÿ táº§ng Core.
            var memberCount  = detail.Members?.Count(m => m.LeftAt == null) ?? 0;
            var taskCount    = detail.Tasks?.Count ?? 0;
            var totalExpense = detail.Expenses?.Sum(ex => ex.Amount) ?? 0;

            var memberList = detail.Members?
                .Where(m => m.LeftAt == null)
                .Select(m => $"  ðŸ‘¤ {m.User?.FullName ?? "?"} â€” {m.ProjectRole ?? "Developer"}")
                .ToList() ?? new();

            var info =
                $"ðŸ“  {detail.Name}\n"                                                                   +
                $"â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”\n\n"                                                    +
                $"KhÃ¡ch hÃ ng:    {detail.Customer?.CompanyName ?? "â€”"}\n"                                 +
                $"Quáº£n lÃ½:       {detail.Owner?.FullName ?? "â€”"}\n"                                       +
                $"Tráº¡ng thÃ¡i:    {UIHelper.FormatProjectStatus(detail.Status)}\n"                         +
                $"NgÃ y báº¯t Ä‘áº§u:  {detail.StartDate:dd/MM/yyyy}\n"                                        +
                $"Deadline:      {(detail.PlannedEndDate.HasValue ? detail.PlannedEndDate.Value.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy") : "â€”")}\n" +
                $"NgÃ¢n sÃ¡ch:     {detail.Budget:N0} â‚«\n"                                                  +
                $"Chi phÃ­ thá»±c:  {totalExpense:N0} â‚«\n"                                                   +
                $"Tiáº¿n Ä‘á»™:       {detail.ProgressPercent}%\n\n"                                           +
                $"â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”â”\n"                                                      +
                $"ðŸ‘¥  ThÃ nh viÃªn ({memberCount})\n"                                                       +
                (memberList.Count > 0 ? string.Join("\n", memberList) : "  ChÆ°a cÃ³ thÃ nh viÃªn")          +
                $"\n\nðŸ“‹  CÃ´ng viá»‡c: {taskCount} task";

            MessageBox.Show(info, "Chi tiáº¿t dá»± Ã¡n", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Filter & Refresh Events â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void txtSearch_TextChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)          => ApplyFilter();
        private void cboFilterStatus_SelectedIndexChanged(object sender, EventArgs e) => ApplyFilter();
        private async void btnRefresh_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)         => await LoadProjectsAsync();

        /// <summary>Double-click: Manager â†’ sá»­a; Developer â†’ xem chi tiáº¿t.</summary>
        private void dgvProjects_CellDoubleClick(object sender, DataGridViewCellEventArgs e)
        {
            if (e.RowIndex < 0) return;
            if (AppSession.IsManager) btnEdit_Click(sender, e);
            else                      btnDetail_Click(sender, e);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Status Bar â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void SetStatus(string msg) => lblStatus.Text = msg;
    }
}

//  frmProjects.Designer.cs  (REFACTORED)

//  â€¢ partial class káº¿ thá»«a BaseForm (thay vÃ¬ Form)
//  â€¢ SetToolButton() private helper â†’ ÄÃƒ XÃ“A
//    Thay báº±ng UIHelper.StyleToolButton() â€” single source of truth
//  â€¢ Táº¥t cáº£ Color/Font hard-code â†’ UIHelper.*
//  â€¢ DataGridView styling â†’ UIHelper.StyleDataGridView()
//  â€¢ Status bar â†’ UIHelper.CreateStatusBar()
// ============================================================
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    partial class frmProjects  // BaseForm declared in frmProjects.cs
    {
        private System.ComponentModel.IContainer components = null;

        protected override void Dispose(bool disposing)
        {
            if (disposing && components != null) components.Dispose();
            base.Dispose(disposing);
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            panelTop        = new Panel();
            lblHeader       = new Label();
            panelFilter     = new Panel();
            txtSearch       = new TextBox();
            cboFilterStatus = new ComboBox();
            btnRefresh      = new Button();
            panelToolbar    = new Panel();
            btnAdd          = new Button();
            btnEdit         = new Button();
            btnDelete       = new Button();
            btnStatus       = new Button();
            btnMembers      = new Button();
            btnDetail       = new Button();
            btnKanban       = new Button();
            lblCount        = new Label();
            dgvProjects     = new DataGridView();
            panelStatus     = new Panel();
            lblStatus       = new Label();

            colId         = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colName       = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colCustomer   = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colOwner      = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colProjStatus = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colMembers    = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colDeadline   = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colBudget     = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();
            colStartDate  = new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn();

            panelTop.SuspendLayout();
            panelFilter.SuspendLayout();
            panelToolbar.SuspendLayout();
            ((System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize)dgvProjects).BeginInit();
            this.SuspendLayout();

            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            // panelTop â€” Header banner
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            panelTop.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderBg;
            panelTop.Dock      = DockStyle.Top;
            panelTop.Height    = 58;
            panelTop.Controls.Add(lblHeader);

            lblHeader.AutoSize  = false;
            lblHeader.Font      = UIHelper.FontHeaderLarge;
            lblHeader.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorHeaderFg;
            lblHeader.Location  = new Point(20, 14);
            lblHeader.Size      = new Size(700, 30);
            lblHeader.Text      = "ðŸ“  Quáº£n lÃ½ Dá»± Ã¡n";

            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            // panelFilter â€” Search + Status filter + Refresh
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            panelFilter.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            panelFilter.Dock      = DockStyle.Top;
            panelFilter.Height    = 46;
            panelFilter.Controls.AddRange(new Control[]
            { txtSearch, cboFilterStatus, btnRefresh });

            // txtSearch
            txtSearch.Location         = new Point(14, 10);
            txtSearch.Size             = new Size(220, 26);
            txtSearch.PlaceholderText  = "ðŸ”  TÃ¬m theo tÃªn, khÃ¡ch hÃ ng, PM...";
            txtSearch.Font             = UIHelper.FontSmall;
            txtSearch.TextChanged     += txtSearch_TextChanged;

            // cboFilterStatus
            cboFilterStatus.DropDownStyle    = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList;
            cboFilterStatus.Font             = UIHelper.FontSmall;
            cboFilterStatus.Location         = new Point(244, 10);
            cboFilterStatus.Size             = new Size(160, 26);
            cboFilterStatus.Items.AddRange(new object[]
            {
                "â€” Táº¥t cáº£ tráº¡ng thÃ¡i â€”",
                "NotStarted", "InProgress", "OnHold", "Completed", "Cancelled"
            });
            cboFilterStatus.SelectedIndex        = 0;
            cboFilterStatus.SelectedIndexChanged += cboFilterStatus_SelectedIndexChanged;

            // btnRefresh
            btnRefresh.Location = new Point(414, 10);
            btnRefresh.Size     = new Size(95, 26);
            UIHelper.StyleButton(btnRefresh, UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Secondary);
            btnRefresh.Text   = "ðŸ”„ LÃ m má»›i";
            btnRefresh.Click += btnRefresh_Click;

            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            // panelToolbar â€” CRUD buttons
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            panelToolbar.BackColor = UIHelper.ColorSurface;
            panelToolbar.Dock      = DockStyle.Top;
            panelToolbar.Height    = 52;
            panelToolbar.Controls.AddRange(new Control[]
            { btnAdd, btnEdit, btnDelete, btnStatus, btnMembers, btnDetail, btnKanban, lblCount });

            //  â”Œâ”€â”€ Button layout constants â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”
            int bx = 14, by = 9, bg = 6, bh = 34;
            //  â””â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”˜

            UIHelper.StyleToolButton(btnAdd,     "âž• ThÃªm má»›i",   UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Primary,  bx, by, 110, bh); bx += 110 + bg;
            UIHelper.StyleToolButton(btnEdit,    "âœï¸  Sá»­a",        UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Success,  bx, by,  80, bh); bx +=  80 + bg;
            UIHelper.StyleToolButton(btnDelete,  "ðŸ—‘ï¸  XÃ³a",        UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Danger,   bx, by,  80, bh); bx +=  80 + bg;
            UIHelper.StyleToolButton(btnStatus,  "ðŸ”„ Tráº¡ng thÃ¡i", UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Warning,  bx, by, 120, bh); bx += 120 + bg;
            UIHelper.StyleToolButton(btnMembers, "ðŸ‘¥ ThÃ nh viÃªn", UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Purple,   bx, by, 120, bh); bx += 120 + bg;
            UIHelper.StyleToolButton(btnDetail,  "ðŸ“‹ Chi tiáº¿t",   UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Slate,    bx, by, 100, bh); bx += 100 + bg;
            UIHelper.StyleToolButton(btnKanban,  "ðŸ—‚ Kanban",     UIHelper.ButtonVariant.Info,     bx, by, 110, bh); bx += 110 + bg;

            // Disable buttons until a row is selected
            btnEdit.Enabled = btnDelete.Enabled = btnStatus.Enabled =
                btnMembers.Enabled = btnDetail.Enabled = btnKanban.Enabled = false;

            btnAdd.Click     += btnAdd_Click;
            btnEdit.Click    += btnEdit_Click;
            btnDelete.Click  += btnDelete_Click;
            btnStatus.Click  += btnStatus_Click;
            btnMembers.Click += btnMembers_Click;
            btnDetail.Click  += btnDetail_Click;
            btnKanban.Click  += btnKanban_Click;

            // lblCount
            lblCount.AutoSize  = false;
            lblCount.Font      = UIHelper.FontSmall;
            lblCount.ForeColor = UIHelper.ColorMuted;
            lblCount.Location  = new Point(bx, by);
            lblCount.Size      = new Size(140, bh);
            lblCount.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft;

            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            // dgvProjects â€” DataGridView
            // [REFACTOR] All DGV styling â†’ UIHelper.StyleDataGridView()
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            UIHelper.StyleDataGridView(dgvProjects);
            UIHelper.ApplyAlternateRowColors(dgvProjects);
            dgvProjects.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            dgvProjects.SelectionChanged += dgvProjects_SelectionChanged;
            dgvProjects.CellDoubleClick  += dgvProjects_CellDoubleClick;

            // Columns
            colId.Name        = "colId";        colId.HeaderText        = "ID";          colId.Visible = false;
            colName.Name      = "colName";      colName.HeaderText      = "TÃªn dá»± Ã¡n";   colName.Width = 200;
            colCustomer.Name  = "colCustomer";  colCustomer.HeaderText  = "KhÃ¡ch hÃ ng";  colCustomer.Width = 140;
            colOwner.Name     = "colOwner";     colOwner.HeaderText     = "PM";          colOwner.Width = 120;
            colProjStatus.Name = "colProjStatus"; colProjStatus.HeaderText = "Tráº¡ng thÃ¡i"; colProjStatus.Width = 145;
            colMembers.Name   = "colMembers";   colMembers.HeaderText   = "ThÃ nh viÃªn";  colMembers.Width = 90;
            colDeadline.Name  = "colDeadline";  colDeadline.HeaderText  = "Deadline";    colDeadline.Width = 95;
            colBudget.Name    = "colBudget";    colBudget.HeaderText    = "NgÃ¢n sÃ¡ch";   colBudget.Width = 115;
            colStartDate.Name = "colStartDate"; colStartDate.HeaderText = "Báº¯t Ä‘áº§u";    colStartDate.AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.Fill;

            dgvProjects.Columns.AddRange(new DataGridViewColumn[]
            { colId, colName, colCustomer, colOwner, colProjStatus, colMembers, colDeadline, colBudget, colStartDate });

            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            // Status Bar
            // [REFACTOR] â†’ UIHelper.CreateStatusBar()
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            (panelStatus, lblStatus) = UIHelper.CreateStatusBar();

            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            // Form
            // â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
            // NOTE: Font, BackColor, AutoScaleMode are set by BaseForm constructor.
            //       Only form-specific properties go here.
            this.ClientSize    = new Size(1000, 600);
            this.Name          = "frmProjects";
            this.Text          = "Quáº£n lÃ½ Dá»± Ã¡n";
            this.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.Manual;

            // Dock order: Fill must be added FIRST, Dock.Top panels added after
            this.Controls.Add(dgvProjects);    // Fill
            this.Controls.Add(panelStatus);    // Bottom
            this.Controls.Add(panelToolbar);   // Top (last Top added = topmost)
            this.Controls.Add(panelFilter);    // Top
            this.Controls.Add(panelTop);       // Top

            panelTop.ResumeLayout(false);
            panelFilter.ResumeLayout(false);
            panelFilter.PerformLayout();
            panelToolbar.ResumeLayout(false);
            ((System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize)dgvProjects).EndInit();
            this.ResumeLayout(false);
        }

        // â”€â”€ Field declarations â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private Panel   panelTop, panelFilter, panelToolbar, panelStatus;
        private Label   lblHeader, lblCount, lblStatus;
        private TextBox txtSearch;
        private ComboBox cboFilterStatus;
        private Button  btnRefresh, btnAdd, btnEdit, btnDelete, btnStatus, btnMembers, btnDetail, btnKanban;
        private DataGridView dgvProjects;
        private DataGridViewTextBoxColumn colId, colName, colCustomer, colOwner;
        private DataGridViewTextBoxColumn colProjStatus, colMembers, colDeadline, colBudget, colStartDate;
    }
}


### ========================================--- FILE: D:\Học tập\Lập Trình Quản Lý\Do-An_Giai-Doan-10\TaskFlowManagement\TaskFlowManagement.WinForms\Forms\frmReportViewer.cs ---
using Microsoft.Reporting.WinForms;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Interfaces.Services;
using TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Common;

namespace TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Forms
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Form hiá»ƒn thá»‹ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o chi phÃ­ vÃ  ngÃ¢n sÃ¡ch dá»± Ã¡n (GÄ9 â€“ UC-Report-01).
    ///
    /// TÃ­ch há»£p Microsoft.Reporting.WinForms (ReportViewer control).
    /// Package NuGet cáº§n thÃªm vÃ o TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.csproj:
    ///   Microsoft.Reporting.WinForms (v15.x hoáº·c má»›i nháº¥t há»— trá»£ .NET 8 WinForms)
    ///
    /// Luá»“ng hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng:
    ///   1. frmExpenses má»Ÿ frmReportViewer, truyá»n vÃ o projectId (null = táº¥t cáº£).
    ///   2. Form_Load â†’ await GetExpenseReportDataAsync() vá»›i WaitCursor.
    ///   3. Táº¡o ReportDataSource tá»« List&lt;ExpenseReportDto&gt;.
    ///   4. Truyá»n Parameter pReporter vÃ  pExportDate vÃ o RDLC.
    ///   5. ReportViewer.RefreshReport() â†’ render PDF/Excel/Word ná»™i tuyáº¿n.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class frmReportViewer : Form
    {
        // â”€â”€ Dependencies â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private readonly IExpenseService _expenseService;

        // â”€â”€ Tham sá»‘ Ä‘áº§u vÃ o â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        /// <summary>
        /// null = bÃ¡o cÃ¡o tá»•ng há»£p táº¥t cáº£ dá»± Ã¡n.
        /// CÃ³ giÃ¡ trá»‹ = bÃ¡o cÃ¡o cho dá»± Ã¡n cá»¥ thá»ƒ.
        /// </summary>
        private readonly int? _projectId;

        // â”€â”€ TÃªn RDLC (embedded resource) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private const string RDLC_NAME = "TaskFlowManagement.WinForms.Reports.ProjectExpenseReport.rdlc";

        // â”€â”€ TÃªn DataSet trong RDLC â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
        private const string DATASET_NAME = "dsExpenseReport";

        // â”€â”€ Constructor â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>
        /// Khá»Ÿi táº¡o ReportViewer form.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="expenseService">Service láº¥y dá»¯ liá»‡u bÃ¡o cÃ¡o (qua DI).</param>
        /// <param name="projectId">
        ///   null  â†’ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o tá»•ng há»£p táº¥t cáº£ dá»± Ã¡n.
        ///   int   â†’ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o cá»§a má»™t dá»± Ã¡n cá»¥ thá»ƒ.
        /// </param>
        public frmReportViewer(IExpenseService expenseService, int? projectId = null)
        {
            _expenseService = expenseService;
            _projectId      = projectId;

            InitializeComponent();
            SetupFormStyle();
        }

        // â”€â”€ UI Setup â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private void SetupFormStyle()
        {
            this.Text            = "ðŸ“Š BÃ¡o cÃ¡o Chi phÃ­ & NgÃ¢n sÃ¡ch Dá»± Ã¡n â€“ TaskFlow Management";
            this.BackColor       = UIHelper.ColorBackground;
            this.MinimumSize     = new Size(1000, 700);
            this.StartPosition   = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            this.WindowState     = FormWindowState.Maximized;
        }

        // â”€â”€ Sá»± kiá»‡n Form Load â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        private async void frmReportViewer_Load(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            await LoadReportAsync();
        }

        // â”€â”€ Logic Náº¡p vÃ  Render BÃ¡o CÃ¡o â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

        /// <summary>
        /// Náº¡p dá»¯ liá»‡u báº¥t Ä‘á»“ng bá»™, táº¡o DataSource vÃ  render RDLC.
        /// Äá»•i con trá» chuá»™t sang WaitCursor khi Ä‘ang táº£i Ä‘á»ƒ bÃ¡o hiá»‡u UI Ä‘ang báº­n.
        /// </summary>
        private async Task LoadReportAsync()
        {
            // 1. Chuyá»ƒn sang WaitCursor â€“ ngÄƒn user click linh tinh khi Ä‘ang load
            this.Cursor   = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            lblStatus.Text = "â³ Äang táº£i dá»¯ liá»‡u bÃ¡o cÃ¡o...";
            lblStatus.Visible = true;

            try
            {
                // 2. Láº¥y dá»¯ liá»‡u báº¥t Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ tá»« Service â†’ Repository â†’ DB
                var reportData = await _expenseService.GetExpenseReportDataAsync(_projectId);

                if (reportData.Count == 0)
                {
                    lblStatus.Text = "â„¹ï¸ KhÃ´ng cÃ³ dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘á»ƒ hiá»ƒn thá»‹ bÃ¡o cÃ¡o.";
                    return;
                }

                lblStatus.Visible = false;

                // 3. Cáº¥u hÃ¬nh ReportViewer â€“ dÃ¹ng cháº¿ Ä‘á»™ Local (khÃ´ng cáº§n Report Server)
                reportViewer.ProcessingMode        = ProcessingMode.Local;
                reportViewer.LocalReport.ReportEmbeddedResource = RDLC_NAME;

                // 4. GÃ¡n DataSource â€“ tÃªn pháº£i khá»›p vá»›i DataSet name trong RDLC
                var dataSource = new ReportDataSource(DATASET_NAME, reportData);
                reportViewer.LocalReport.DataSources.Clear();
                reportViewer.LocalReport.DataSources.Add(dataSource);

                // 5. Truyá»n Parameters vÃ o RDLC
                //    pReporter  â†’ NgÆ°á»i xuáº¥t bÃ¡o cÃ¡o (láº¥y tá»« AppSession)
                //    pExportDate â†’ NgÃ y xuáº¥t (DateTime.Now, format vi-VN)
                var parameters = new ReportParameter[]
                {
                    new ReportParameter(
                        "pReporter",
                        AppSession.FullName
                    ),
                    new ReportParameter(
                        "pExportDate",
                        DateTime.Now.ToString("dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)
                    )
                };
                reportViewer.LocalReport.SetParameters(parameters);

                // 6. Refresh â€“ trigger render RDLC thÃ nh ná»™i dung hiá»ƒn thá»‹
                reportViewer.RefreshReport();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                // VÃ²ng láº·p nÃ y sáº½ Ä‘Ã o táº­n gá»‘c rá»… táº¥t cáº£ cÃ¡c InnerException Ä‘ang bá»‹ giáº¥u
                string errorDetails = "";
                Exception? currentEx = ex;
                while (currentEx != null)
                {
                    errorDetails += "ðŸ‘‰ " + currentEx.Message + "\n\n";
                    currentEx = currentEx.InnerException;
                }

                lblStatus.Text = "âŒ Lá»—i Ä‘á»‹nh nghÄ©a bÃ¡o cÃ¡o (xem popup)";
                MessageBox.Show(
                    $"ToÃ n bá»™ chuá»—i lá»—i:\n\n{errorDetails}",
                    "Khui Lá»—i BÃ¡o CÃ¡o",
                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Error
                );
            }
            finally
            {
                // 7. KhÃ´i phá»¥c con trá» chuá»™t dÃ¹ thÃ nh cÃ´ng hay lá»—i
                this.Cursor = Cursors.Default;
            }
        }
    }
}

            this.lblStatus.TextAlign = System.Drawing.ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft;
            this.lblStatus.Visible   = true;

            // â”€â”€ reportViewer â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
            this.reportViewer.Dock                        = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill;
            this.reportViewer.Name                        = "reportViewer";
            this.reportViewer.TabIndex                    = 0;
            this.reportViewer.ZoomMode                    = Microsoft.Reporting.WinForms.ZoomMode.PageWidth;
            this.reportViewer.ShowParameterPrompts        = false;
            this.reportViewer.ShowCredentialPrompts       = false;

            // â”€â”€ frmReportViewer â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
            this.AutoScaleDimensions = new System.Drawing.SizeF(7F, 15F);
            this.AutoScaleMode       = System.Windows.Forms.AutoScaleMode.Font;
            this.ClientSize          = new System.Drawing.Size(1200, 800);
            this.Controls.Add(this.panelContent);
            this.Controls.Add(this.panelHeader);
            this.MinimumSize         = new System.Drawing.Size(1000, 700);
            this.Name                = "frmReportViewer";
            this.StartPosition       = System.Windows.Forms.FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            this.WindowState         = System.Windows.Forms.FormWindowState.Maximized;
            this.Load               += new System.EventHandler(this.frmReportViewer_Load);

            this.panelHeader.ResumeLayout(false);
            this.panelContent.ResumeLayout(false);
            this.ResumeLayout(false);
        }

        #endregion
    }
}

using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using TaskFlowManagement.Core.Entities;
